capabilities.name: FedRAMP 20x KSI Alignment
capabilities.description: Key Security Indicator mappings from UIAO canon
capabilities.remarks: [{"concept": "Conversation as Atomic Unit", "nist-control": "AC-4", "ksi-category": "KSI-CNA", "evidence-source": "Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Flow Telemetry"}, {"concept": "Identity as Root Namespace", "nist-control": "IA-2 / AC-2", "ksi-category": "KSI-IAM", "evidence-source": "Microsoft Entra ID / CyberArk Logs"}, {"concept": "Deterministic Addressing", "nist-control": "CM-8 / AC-4", "ksi-category": "KSI-PIY", "evidence-source": "Infoblox BloxOne DDI API"}, {"concept": "Cert-Anchored Overlay", "nist-control": "SC-8 / IA-5", "ksi-category": "KSI-SVC", "evidence-source": "Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN mTLS Configuration"}, {"concept": "Telemetry as Control", "nist-control": "CA-7 / SI-4", "ksi-category": "KSI-MLA", "evidence-source": "Microsoft INR Telemetry Feed"}, {"concept": "Embedded Governance", "nist-control": "CM-2", "ksi-category": "KSI-CMT", "evidence-source": "GitHub Repository YAML Baseline"}, {"concept": "Public Service First", "nist-control": "PT-2", "ksi-category": "KSI-CED", "evidence-source": "Identity and Overlay Layer Data Minimization"}]
